doc_title_en: Notice of Opinion in Support of and Recommendation for Participation in Tender Offer for Company Shares by Daido Special Steel Co., Ltd., a Related Company

key_facts.reason_jp: 完全子会社化、上場廃止予定

summary_en: Daido Special Steel initiated a tender offer for all shares of Tohoku Steel at ¥4,491 per share to make it a wholly-owned subsidiary, with delisting planned.
summary_jp: 大同特殊鋼が東北特殊鋼の全株式を1株当たり4,491円で公開買付け、完全子会社化を目的とする。
tag_en: MBO · ¥4,491/share · Daido Special Steel acquiring Tohoku Steel · Delisting planned
tag_jp: MBO・大同特殊鋼による東北特殊鋼の公開買付け・完全子会社化・上場廃止予定
